reviews.title: We won't be back because of the checkout issue we had to deal with.
reviews.positives:
1.We had an issue when we checked out. The front desk told us they couldn't find the laundry bag in our room. If they couldn't find it, we would be charged $100,000 VND. When I came in the room, around 9pm, we were tired after a long day in a car, we didn't check the laundry bag. So, we were not sure we would be responsible for the loss. My friends who stayed in that room weren't in the lobby when we checked out, so we couldn't check it with her. My sister had to call them asking about the bag and they told us they didn't see it. We told the front desk we didn't take the bag. After that, they told us their staff didn't put the bag in our room. We are not happy with what they told us. They should have checked it with their staff FIRST before they asked the customers. That made us so uncomfortable and unhappy. It's 5 star hotel and staff should be trained well enough to deal with a very small issue like this.  
2.The carpet in the room is pretty old and it should be replaced as well. 
3.We appreciated a front desk check-in staff upgraded one room to the river view for my family. 
4. The location is great, jus a short walk to Cai Rang boat station for Cho Noi Boat tour.
reviews.negatives: Staff should be trained better.

reviews.title: Shower door gaps
reviews.text:
First night shower water leaked everywhere within the bathroom. Went to front desk to rest to fix since I had already unpack so didn't want to move to another room because so late at night. Front desk said they will investigate and to get shower fix. Second day, nothing and asked front desk what happened to investigation then they smiled and said they will ask again. I gave up on front desk so I decided to ask cleaning service who was cleaning next room. Cleaning lady quickly got hotel handyman and readjust the shower door brackets and gaps were fixed. After 2 nights of walking in half inch of water in the bathroom after shower, I definitely will provide my review. Never again will stay at this hotel.

Cleaning staff very nice and helpful.

reviews.title: Nice location
reviews.positives: The location is excellent for a view of the sunrise from your balcony or to see the bridge lights at night.
reviews.negatives: We had heard there were Tet celebrations and asked the front desk for more information.  They told us it was last year. However, we still walked to area and found much going on. Very disappointed that staff unwilling to investigate and answer our questions about exploring and enjoying the area. The furnishings are becoming worn out. The walls are thin. The party boat is parked right outside, so you are in the party if you like it or not. Breakfast is very oriented to the Chinese guest. It felt as the actual Vietnamese options were limited and the fresh fruits were not ripe. The casino is strange with most of it under repair and only takes USD.

reviews.title: Not recommend
reviews.text: One hour post checking in, room has toxic smell, we, two healthy adults world travelers fell nauseous, headache, lethargic, intoxicated. Room smelled some sort air freshener that kept getting more and more intense. We contacted staff and one person immediately came in with the intention of finding and removing the air freshener. Except all three of us could not find this air freshener. Another staff showed up with lighter and some tool with intention of burning some fragrance. We told her we do not want her to burn some smell to mask the toxic fragrance. We then were offered to move to next door. More problem continued but we  are currently on vacation and we do not want to spend our precious time to list out other undesired things.  We definitely will not come back to this hotel at all. Very sorry for the condition of this operation
reviews.response:
Dear Mrs Yen Chi,

Thank you for choosing to stay with us at TTC Hotel Can Tho and describing your dissatisfaction with the facilities here. We appreciate your sincerity and must agree that your stay did not meet your expectation. Please accept our truly apologies.

Your feedback was sent to the Manager Board of TTC Hotel Can Tho, and we are working to maintain our facilities so that such problems will never happen again. 

It is a pleasure to announce that we will be implementing many of these upgrades to the property within the next couple of months.  In taking great care of our charming hotel, our main priority is to be able to offer a very well-maintained and comfortable atmosphere.

We hope that we can convince you to change your mind about another visit to our property. Please reach out to us directly if you would be willing to give us a chance to turn your experience around.

Sincerely,

reviews.title: Enjoyable stay in Can Tho!
reviews.positives: Walkable location, spacious comfortable room, friendly and helpful staff. Opportunities to visit the floating market & smaller canals, and cycle quiet rural roads 20 minutes away.
reviews.negatives: Noisy in the evening due to nearby bars, but music stops around 11pm.

reviews.title: Family trip
reviews.text: Khách sạn hơi cũ, phòng nhỏ và thảm trải sàn vệt ố rất nhiều. Bãi đậu xe quá nhỏ nên rất bất tiện
reviews.response:
Kính chào Anh/Chị! 
Chúng tôi xin chân thành cảm ơn Anh/Chị đã tin tưởng, sử dụng dịch vụ tại Khách Sạn TTC Cần Thơ và đã có những chia sẻ chân tình với chúng tôi. 

Chúng tôi vô cùng hạnh phúc được Anh/Chị đánh giá về chất lượng dịch vụ của khách sạn. Bên cạnh đó chúng tôi thành thật xin lỗi về những bất tiện mà Anh/Chị gặp phải trong quá trình lưu trú tại Khách sạn. 

Sự trải nghiệm của Anh/Chị như một lời động viên rất lớn và chúng tôi vẫn không ngừng hoàn thiện để ngày càng phục vụ tốt hơn. Chúng tôi hân hạnh được đón tiếp và phục vụ Anh/Chị và Gia Đình trong những chuyến đi mới trong tương lai tại Cần Thơ, Hồ Chí Minh, Đà Lạt, Ninh Thuận, Bình Thuận, Nha Trang, Hội An, Huế và Campuchia. 

Một lần nữa, chúng tôi xin gửi lời cảm ơn sâu sắc và kính chúc Anh/Chị cùng gia đình luôn dồi dào sức khỏe và vạn sự thành công. 


Trân trọng!

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.positives: With balcony rooms right on the waterfront to watch the river traffic go by, TTC is an excellent business hotel. Our king riverfront was very spacious with a great bed, tub and shower, fridge, and lots of hanging space, which was suspended from the ceiling so as not to take up floor space. The large balcony chairs and table made for a great take out eating spot in the evening as we watched the town parade by numerous neon boats. Staff are super kind. And a good spa gives an excellent massage. Didn't use the pool, but it looked fine. Workout room beside.
reviews.negatives: Breakfast is huge but pretty skimpy for vegetarians. The karaoke bar down the block keeps it cranking until just before 10.

Khách sạn thường có sự kiện nên rất ồn - đã chọn phòng giường lớn nhưng lại bố trí phòng  2 giường nhỏ ghép lại nên nằm ngủ rất khó chịu 
Buffet sáng rất ngon 
VỊ trí thuận tiện
reviews.response:
Kính chào Anh/Chị! 
Chúng tôi xin chân thành cảm ơn Anh/Chị đã tin tưởng, sử dụng dịch vụ tại Khách Sạn TTC Cần Thơ và đã có những chia sẻ chân tình với chúng tôi. 
Chúng tôi vô cùng hạnh phúc được Anh/Chị đánh giá về chất lượng dịch vụ của khách sạn. Bên cạnh đó chúng tôi thành thật xin lỗi về những bất tiện mà Anh/Chị gặp phải trong quá trình lưu trú tại Khách sạn. 
Sự trải nghiệm của Anh/Chị như một lời động viên rất lớn và chúng tôi vẫn không ngừng hoàn thiện để ngày càng phục vụ tốt hơn. 
Chúng tôi hân hạnh được đón tiếp và phục vụ Anh/Chị và Gia Đình trong những chuyến đi mới trong tương lai tại Cần Thơ, Hồ Chí Minh, Đà Lạt, Ninh Thuận, Bình Thuận, Nha Trang, Hội An, Huế và Campuchia. 
Một lần nữa, chúng tôi xin gửi lời cảm ơn sâu sắc và kính chúc Anh/Chị cùng gia đình luôn dồi dào sức khỏe và vạn sự thành công. 
Trân trọng!

reviews.title: Pleasant hotel but not a 5 star
reviews.text: Overall it was a nice hotel to stay in , the location is practically perfect , good breakfast and large rooms. The hotel is showing some age, water pressure was very weak. the gym is virtually non existent with a circa 1970 universal machine which was very flimsy and impossible to use, the pool was nice tough.

reviews.title: A cantho trip
reviews.text:
- Good location with a nice view to NK quay. It’s fun to see people walking and enjoying their Saturday night. Also, the breakfast is well- repaired. The hotel staff is also helpful and friendly. It’s a big plus point.
- Some not- so- good points:
+ there should be more pillows in the room. There are only 2 ones in a deluxe room. I find it too less, should be 4 to match the 5-star standard. Plus, the pillow quality should be upgraded. They are old and too soft.
+ The hotel may supply more  items in the bathroom like small tubes of lotions and hair conditioner. They should be signature items to represent the hotel image. There are only 2 tubes of shampoo and shower gel with no brands and of course some other stuffs . I think they may devalue the bathroom design.
- My room has only one chair in the balcony. There is no table and another chair. I find it strange and unlike other rooms. 
- King size bed of my room is only 1.6m wide. I think it’s a queen size one. I booked a king bed. However, I was a solo traveller, so I can accept this mistake. I don’t think the mattress quality is so good. It’s down much on the middle part.

 Wir hatten ein Zimmer mit Blick auf den Mekong. Das ist sehr schön, aber abends wird es sehr laut. Schlechte Schallisolierung. Die Dusche entsprach eher einem Hotel der 2 Sterne Kategorie (Bilder bei booking waren für unser Zimmer unzutreffend). Die Dusche war in einer alten Badewanne mit schlichtem Duschvorhang und wenn man nicht sehr aufpasste, stand danach das ganze Badezimmer unter Wasser. reviews.title: Sehr schöner Blick, aber abgewohnt
reviews.positives:
An sich sehr schön gelegen. Toller Blick aufs Wasser! Aber man muss den Lärm wollen, der bis 22.00Uhr unerbittlich auf den Hotelgast von der Promenade eindrischt. Bei mir waren es mehrere Gesänge gleichzeitig, nur aufgelockert von Hupeinlagen ankernder Restaurantschiffe. Wer es ruhig(er?) mag, ist vllt auf der Stadtseite besser aufgehoben. Dann aber ohne den phantastischen Blick vom Balkon!
Tja - ansonsten…. In die Jahre gekommen; erbaut wohl Ende der Nullerjahre wäre aus meiner Sicht eine gründliche Auffrischung fällig. Ich bin nicht empfindlich, aber vom Baufach (und da wohl schon kritisch). Ich hatte mir das Hotel am Ende meiner 5 Wochen Vietnam gegönnt - es war mit einigem Abstand das teuerste meiner Reise, aber bei weitem nicht annähernd an den besten Unterkünften dran. reviews.title: Business visit
reviews.text:
Location is great. There’s a Highland Café in front of the hotel on the first floor.

When using it from Gunters Airport, I arrive in the morning, but early check-in isn't possible; it might be possible about an hour early at most.

After storing your luggage, you can start the river tour right away and then have a meal or get a massage, which would match your timing perfectly. You can exchange money at the bank next door with minimal exchange rate differences. The location is great, and the staff's English is very, very, very good. Their friendliness is great.

However, the TTC hotel itself provides welcome fruits, which they brought to me about 2 hours after checking in.

The problem is that when I'm trying to take a shower and relax, they suddenly call for room service, which is quite surprising.

Also, I noticed some ants, and the river view is quite noisy due to motorcycles and people.

There's a residential house right behind, and I felt like I was going crazy listening to someone singing for 6 hours straight; the water pressure was also weak.

But overall, I was satisfied with the hotel itself.

reviews.title: Geen 5-sterrenhotel, wel heel vriendelijk personeel
reviews.positives:
Het personeel was echt heel behulpzaam en vriendelijk. Bij de receptie deden ze er echt alles aan om het zo aangenaam mogelijk te maken. Ook het personeel bij de ingang en het ontbijt waren heel vriendelijk.
Ontbijt was goed en afwisselend. De eerste dag kregen we een ontbijt mee omdat we met excursie gingen. Dat was ook echt goed verzorgd.
Vanuit de kamer mooi uitzicht op de rivier, fijn dat er een balkon was.
reviews.negatives:
Dit is geen 5 sterren hotel. Op de verdiepingen en kamer lag vloerbedekking wat oud en vies was (stond op booking omschreven dat het een stenen vloer was in het hotel). De kamer rook muf en bij de douch zat schimmel.
Het hotel zag er uitgeleefd uit en was niet meer van deze tijd. Voor het geld vond ik het niet waard.
Personeel maakt wel veel goed en de ontbijtzaal zag er wel goed en schoon uit.

reviews.title: Breakfast is great! Staff service is good too.
reviews.text:
I checked into 2 triple rooms, #501 and #506.  The third bed is an additional bed with movable frame. The room condition is dated, carpet and furniture is old. One of the bathroom showerhead is not working (with very slow flowing water), only rainshower could work. Not too big a problem for us as we were not too particular, and the partial river view helped to distract us from these.

Good points are breakfast and swimming pool! Breakfast hall is large with good spread of food and quality, food well labeled too. Service staff are friendly and fast to help or clear up the tables. Swimming pool is good size and clean.

Staff helped to prepare breakfast pack for us for collection at 5am, when we needed to go for floating market tour at 5.30am. Really nice and great appreciation to their gesture!
